creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you connect to same hosts using xfreerdp in terminal without Remmina?

I don't use Remmina for RDP - it has a very strange bug with the keyboard not working properly.

For example my usual command line is:
xfreerdp /u:USER /v:IP /w:1272 /h:852 /bpp:24
Also you can use /p:PASSWORD option.
